title: Make TypeScript web fixture real
outOfScope: Changing the generic fixture harness semantics
Claiming external repository or enterprise control evidence

sources.reason: Defines the real TypeScript fixture lifecycle acceptance criteria.
Defines the boundary between local fixture execution and external evidence.
Existing adoption lifecycle and rollback evidence patterns.

riskAssessment.reason: Adds an executable local TypeScript fixture; external provider and enterprise evidence remain explicitly out of scope.

executionDecision.reason: The user authorized the serial remediation plan and local Node/TypeScript tooling is available for deterministic verification.

preReviewWarnings: Record real npm install/build/test/lint execution and mark unavailable external steps not_run.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The TypeScript fixture has a package manifest, lockfile, source, and executable test/build/lint commands.
Install, Configure, Normal Work Item, Ambiguous Request, Critical Domain Change, Upgrade, Rollback, and Release Check are locally reproducible.
Evidence records actual command results and distinguishes not_run external-provider steps.
Tests validate the fixture lifecycle and fail-closed boundary wording.
TypeScript adaptation documentation describes the real fixture without overclaiming.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The TypeScript Web fixture is only a manifest consumed by a dependency-free Python simulator, so it cannot evidence real install, build, test, lint, upgrade, or rollback execution.
constraints: Keep the fixture minimal and local.
Do not treat local execution as external repository, identity, sandbox, or compliance proof.
intent.rationale: Add a small executable TypeScript project with deterministic lifecycle scripts and evidence output that can be rerun in CI.

rawUserRequest: 继续执行评审整改计划工单 9：把 TypeScript Web Fixture 提升为真实可安装、可构建、可测试、可升级、可回滚的 Fixture，并按完整 PR 流程循环。

declaredIntent.summary: Provide executable local TypeScript lifecycle evidence instead of a manifest-only simulation.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: npm install/build/test/lint execute against the fixture
Ambiguous and critical-domain lifecycle cases block with resume conditions
Upgrade and rollback are real local filesystem transitions
External provider evidence is explicitly not_run rather than simulated

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly authorized the complete serial remediation plan.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
